snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.payment.create(
    amount=1,
    currency="USD",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.payment.create(
        amount=1,
        currency="USD",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.payment.delete(
        payment_id="paymentId",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
